zh.lifeSummary: 當Amauri de St. Amand於1235年出生在英國波克夏時，他的父親Ralph de St. Amand36歲，母親Asceline d'Aubigny34歲。他於大約1251年與Isabel de Pantulf在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1285年11月12日在英國巴金哈姆爾格倫登 安德伍德享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Amauri de St. Amand于1235年出生在英国波克夏时，他的父亲Ralph de St. Amand36岁，母亲Asceline d'Aubigny34岁。他于大约1251年与Isabel de Pantulf在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1285年11月12日在英国巴金哈姆爾格倫登 安德伍德享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: St.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: 1  French: habitational name from any of the places so called, for example in Normandy, named from a religious dedication to a (male) St. Clair.
2  North American variant spelling of   St  .   Claire  .

variants.name: Claire
meanings: Variant of   Clair  , an altered form of German   Klare  .

variants.name: St
meanings: Americanized spelling of French   St  .   Denis  .

nameMeanings.name: Amand
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and Walloon, and in some cases possibly also English (of Norman origin), Dutch, or Flemish: from the Old French personal name Amand, Amant, Latin amandus ‘suitable to be loved’, the name of a 5th-century bishop of Bordeaux and several other Christian saints. In England it was also used as a female personal name.

variants.name: Ament
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Amand  .
Hungarian (Áment): probably of German origin (see 2 above). The surname Ament, presumably of Hungarian origin, is also found in Croatia.

nameMeanings.name: Amauri
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Marcello, Vito, Carmel, Franco, Giulio, Nicolo, Salvatore, Vita.
Italian (mainly Sicily): patronymic or plural form of   Amaro  .

Japanese: written 余 ‘surplus’, usually phonetically 甘利 or 天利. It appears to be a shortening of 余戸 amaribe ‘surplus doors’, a reference to the practice among census takers from ancient times up to the era of the Tokugawa Shogunate (1603–1867) of listing households in groups of fifty; any households exceeding this number or a multiple of it were referred to as ‘surplus’. This surname is found mainly in northeastern Japan.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Amauri de St. Amand was born in 1235, in Berkshire, England, his father, Ralph de St. Amand, was 36 and his mother, Asceline d'Aubigny, was 34. He married Isabel de Pantulf about 1251, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 12 November 1285, in Grendon Underwood, Buckinghamshire, England, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Amauri de St. Amand est né en 1235, à Berkshire, Angleterre, son père, Ralph de St. Amand, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Asceline d'Aubigny, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Isabel de Pantulf environ 1251, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 12 novembre 1285, à Grendon Underwood, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Amauri de St. Amandが1235年にイギリスバークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Ralph de St. Amandは36歳，母Asceline d'Aubignyは34歳であった。約1251年にイギリスイギリスでIsabel de Pantulfと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1285年11月12日にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアグレンドン ウンデルウッドで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Amauri de St. Amand(이)가 1235년 영국 버크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph de St. Amand(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Asceline d'Aubigny(은)는 34세였다. 그는 대략 1251년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Isabel de Pantulf(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1285년 11월 12일 영국 벅잉함실르 그렌던 운더우드에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Amauri de St. Amand родился в 1235 г. в местности биркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Ralph de St. Amand было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Asceline d'Aubigny, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel de Pantulf около 1251 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 12 ноября 1285 г. в местности грендон ундирвуд, буккингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 50 лет.
